title: 12520011822 Carburetor, Replacement for Echo TC-210 TC-210i TC-2100 Replacement for 7222M with SV-4B Engine, Replaces C1U-K54A 12520013122 12520013123
features: Fitment: Replacement for Echo TC-210 TC-210i TC-2100, Replacement for Echo & Mantis 7222 7225 2 Cycle Tillers / Cultivators with SV-4/B SV-5C/2 SV-6/2 Engine, More models are available in the product descriptions below

Easy Installation: The carburetor's simple design and the accessories required for installation allow the user to easily install it at home without the need for specialized tools or skills, saving time and energy

Improved Performance: The carburetor is designed to effectively improve fuel-air mixing efficiency and enhance engine performance, ensuring smooth power delivery and better response under all operating conditions

Endurance Property: : Carburetor is made of robust materials with corrosion and wear resistance, which can maintain stable performance in harsh environments, prolonging the service life and reducing the frequency of replacement
description: Fitment: Replacement for Echo TC-210 TC-210i TC-2100 Replacement for Echo & Mantis 7222 7225 2 Cycle Tillers / Cultivators with SV-4/B SV-5C/2 SV-6/2 Engine Replacement for the following 2-cycle Mantis tiller / cultivator Models: 7222M with SV-4B engine 7222E with SV-4B engine, produced from 1/1991 to 8/1997 7222 with SV-4B1E engine, produced from 8/1997 to 12/2000 7222 with SV-4B1E engine, produced from 1/2001 to 1/2003 7222 with SV-5C engine, produced from 1/2003 to 3/2004 7222 with SV-5C/1 engine, produced from 3/2003 to 3/14/2005 7222 with SV-5C/2 engine, produced from 3/15/2005 to date 7225 with SV-5C/2 engine, produced from 3/15/2005 to date 7230 with FastStart SV-5CI engine, produced from 3/2003 to 3/2005 7230 with FastStart SV-5CI/2 engine, produced in January 2010 7234 with SV-5CI/2 engine, produced from Aug 2011 to date 7240 with FastStart SV-5CI/2 engine, produced in January 2010 7920 with SV-5C/2 engine, produced from Aug 2014 to date 7924 with SV-5CI/2 engine, produced from Aug 2014 to date Replace Part Number: 12520013124, 12520013122 C1U-K54A, 12520011822 12520013123 Package Includes: 1 × carburetor 2 × mounting gaskets 1 × air filter 1 × fuel lines 1 × spark plug 2 × primer bulbs
